changes.value:
swissarmyhammer-tools/src/mcp/tools/shell/execute_command/mod.rs (line 27)

All other operation modules declare their params statics as plain `static` (module-private):
- `list_processes/mod.rs`: `static LIST_PROCESSES_PARAMS`
- `kill_process/mod.rs`: `static KILL_PROCESS_PARAMS`
- `search_history/mod.rs`: `static SEARCH_HISTORY_PARAMS`
- `grep_history/mod.rs`: `static GREP_HISTORY_PARAMS`
- `get_lines/mod.rs`: `static GET_LINES_PARAMS`

But `execute_command/mod.rs` declares `pub(crate) static EXECUTE_COMMAND_PARAMS`. This is inconsistent with the pattern and exposes an internal detail unnecessarily.

Suggestion: Remove the `pub(crate)` visibility to match all the other operations."
nit: `EXECUTE_COMMAND_PARAMS` is `pub(crate)` while all other operation param statics are private

+swissarmyhammer-tools/src/mcp/tools/shell/execute_command/mod.rs (line 27)

All other operation modules declare their params statics as plain `static` (module-private):
- `list_processes/mod.rs`: `static LIST_PROCESSES_PARAMS`
- `kill_process/mod.rs`: `static KILL_PROCESS_PARAMS`
- `search_history/mod.rs`: `static SEARCH_HISTORY_PARAMS`
